description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a light gray fabric. The sofa features three large, loose back cushions and three seat cushions, all uniform in size and shape, providing a clean and structured appearance. Two accent pillows, one in a matching gray and the other in a contrasting deep purple, are placed on the left side of the seat. The armrests are straight, broad, and at the same height as the backrest, contributing to the sofa's boxy silhouette. The legs are short, black, and slightly recessed, giving the sofa a floating effect above the ground. The overall look is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern living spaces.
description: A sleek, light gray modern sofa with three large cushions, straight armrests, and two accent pillows, one purple. The design is minimalist and contemporary, with short black legs and a structured silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view showing three large seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and two accent pillows (one purple, one gray) on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the armrest, and the placement of the accent pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, continuous back and the three back cushions, with no visible decorative elements.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the sofa's depth, the straight armrest, and the side profile of the accent pillows.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all uniform in size, with two accent pillows (one gray, one purple) placed on the left side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, broad armrests at seat and backrest height, with a boxy, minimalist profile and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, black legs positioned at the corners and slightly recessed, with a simple, unobtrusive design and likely made of metal.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with three loose, uniform back cushions and a continuous, unadorned rear surface.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
